series_metadata.series_description: These records include service forestry case files for activities not related to a formal landowner incentive or planning program administered or supported by the Division of Forestry..

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain files for 15 years from the date of the last activity on file and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain files for 15 years from the date of last activity on file and then destroy. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copies can be destroyed at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Trash
